ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poi_types" (
  "poi_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poi type */,
  "poi_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the poi type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poi_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_types" (
  "asset_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset type */,
  "asset_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_status" (
  "asset_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset status */,
  "asset_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shelter_status" (
  "shelter_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shelter status */,
  "shelter_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the shelter status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shelter_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_unit_status" (
  "housing_unit_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing unit status */,
  "housing_unit_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the housing unit status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_unit_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shelters" (
  "shelter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shelter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the shelter */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Current population in the shelter */,
  "capacity_day" INTEGER /* Capacity of the shelter per day */,
  "status" INTEGER /* Operational status of the shelter */,
  "gps_marker" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the shelter's location */,
  "popup_format" TEXT /* Format for popup details on the map */,
  "shelter_status_id" INTEGER /* Status of the shelter */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the shelter */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact name of the shelter */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the shelter */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the shelter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shelter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing unit */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the housing unit */,
  "population_day" INTEGER /* Current population in the housing unit */,
  "capacity_day" INTEGER /* Capacity of the housing unit per day */,
  "cstatus" INTEGER /* Current status of the housing unit */,
  "gps_marker" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the housing unit's location */,
  "popup_format" TEXT /* Format for popup details on the map */,
  "housing_unit_status_id" INTEGER /* Status of the housing unit */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the housing unit */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact name of the housing unit */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the housing unit */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the housing unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "points_of_interest" (
  "poi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each point of interest */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the point of interest */,
  "poi_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the point of interest */,
  "gps_marker" TEXT /* GPS coordinates of the point of interest */,
  "popup_format" TEXT /* Format for popup details on the map */,
  "poi_category_id" INTEGER /* Category of the point of interest */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact name of the point of interest */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the point of interest */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the point of interest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poi_id")
)
